title: 29. Piano Player: Range Modes
original_text: We kept the Pianola window moving and finished another roadmap item: range mode. In [app.py]..., the `Piano Player` dialog now has a `Range` selector with: `Exact`, `Used octaves`... `Exact` keeps the current tight per-track note span. `Used octaves` expands each track to full octave boundaries... I added coverage in [test_app_playlist.py]... I updated [Roadmap.md]... and refreshed the user guides... Verification is clean: ... 160 tests OK...
expected_subject: feat(ui): add range modes to Piano Player window
expected_body_lines: - Add Range selector with Exact and Used octaves options
- Expand keyboards to full octave boundaries in Used octaves mode
- Keep Exact mode as default for tight per-track note spans
- Show status bar confirmation when range mode changes
- Update user guides (EN/ES) and Roadmap.md with new docs
- Add tests for range expansion logic and UI feedback
expected_command:
git commit -m "feat(ui): add range modes to Piano Player window" \
  -m "- Add Range selector with Exact and Used octaves options" \
  -m "- Expand keyboards to full octave boundaries in Used octaves mode" \
  -m "- Keep Exact mode as default for tight per-track note spans" \
  -m "- Show status bar confirmation when range mode changes" \
  -m "- Update user guides (EN/ES) and Roadmap.md with new docs" \
  -m "- Add tests for range expansion logic and UI feedback" \
  -m "- Validation: compileall OK, 160 tests pass"
